tagline: Clean lines, careful prep, and a finish that lasts — interior and exterior painting for homes across Henry County.
services_intro: An owner-run residential painting company serving Stockbridge and Henry County. Sharp prep, clean lines, and durable finishes — inside and out — done the way you'd want it done in your own home.
service_1_desc: Full-room and whole-interior repaints with sharp lines and clean prep — walls, trim, and ceilings for homes across Henry County.
service_2_desc: Exterior repaints, siding and trim painting, and surface prep to refresh and protect the outside of residential properties.
service_3_desc: Pressure washing plus deck renovation and fence work to prep and restore outdoor surfaces before or alongside painting.
review_1_quote: Did a beautiful job on our interior — clean lines, careful prep, and they left the place spotless. Highly recommend.
review_2_quote: Showed up when they said, gave a fair price, and the finish looks great. Couldn't be happier with the work.
review_3_quote: Professional and easy to work with from the first estimate to the final coat. Our house looks brand new.
about_paragraph: JJ's Painting Company is an owner-run residential painting contractor based on Brown Road in Stockbridge, GA, serving homeowners throughout Henry County. From single-room refreshes to whole-home interior and exterior repaints — plus pressure washing, deck renovation, and fence work — the focus is the same on every job: thorough prep, clean lines, and a finish that holds up. Fair quotes, tidy workspaces, and work that earns the next referral from your neighbors.
